summary: UX tweaks verification for CarryOn estate planning - Edit Beneficiary page, Edit Milestone Message page, and DAV slide-in panel. All code changes verified via Playwright tests and code review.

integration_issues.issue: Clicking on message card from /messages page does not navigate to edit page in automated tests - may need specific edit button click, not card click

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Console shows hydration warning for <span> inside <select>/<option> elements (EditBeneficiaryPage relations dropdown) - cosmetic issue, does not affect functionality
context_for_next_testing_agent: All UX tweaks implemented correctly: 1) Edit Beneficiary page has camera icon on avatar, no security note, slide-in animation, bouncy cards. 2) Edit Milestone page has slide-in animation, bouncy cards, cleaned subtitle. 3) DAV uses WalletEntryPanel slide-in panel instead of Dialog modal, with bouncy glass cards. CSS animations defined in index.css with 768px breakpoint for desktop.

features_verified.edit_beneficiary_security_note_removed: YES - no 'Sensitive beneficiary details remain encrypted' text
features_verified.edit_beneficiary_slide_animation: YES - animate-slide-in-right class on page container
features_verified.edit_message_subtitle_cleaned: YES - 'Update content and delivery rules' (no 'old modal')
features_verified.dav_slide_panel: YES - WalletEntryPanel component with slide-panel-enter animation
features_verified.dav_not_dialog: YES - no [role='dialog'], uses fixed panel with slide animation
